f:["$","$L70",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\n\n# Basic storage\nmem.remember(\"User prefers dark mode.\")\n\n# With entity extraction — captures \"PostgreSQL\" as a triple\nmem.remember(\"We decided to use PostgreSQL.\", extract_entities=True)\n\n# With fact extraction — LLM pulls structured facts\nmem.remember(\n  \"The project deadline moved to June 15th. Alice is the lead.\",\n  extract=True,\n  importance=0.8,\n)\n","language":"python"}]

11:["$","p",null,{"children":"Retrieve relevant memories using hybrid vector + full-text search with configurable scoring weights and temporal decay."}]
12:["$","$L70",null,{"code":"recall(\n  query: str,\n  top_k: int = 5,\n  temporal_weight: float = 0.3,\n  query_time: str | None = None,\n  temporal_halflife: float = 168.0,\n  vec_weight: float = 50.0,\n  fts_weight: float = 30.0,\n  importance_weight: float = 20.0,\n  author_id: str | None = None,\n  author_type: str | None = None,\n  channel_id: str | None = None,\n  veracity: str | None = None,\n) -> list[dict]\n","language":"python"}]
13:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Parameter"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"query"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"str"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Natural much recency decay influences the final score in hours for the exponential recency decay (default 168h = 7 days)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"vec_weight"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"float"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"50.0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Weight for vector similarity score"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"fts_weight"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"float"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"30.0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Weight for FTS5 text relevance score"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"importance_weight"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"float"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"20.0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Weight for the memory's importance rating"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"author_id"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"str | 14:["$","p",null,{"children":["Each result dict includes keys like ",["$","code",null,{"children":"id"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"importance"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"timestamp"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"score"}],", and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tier"}]," (indicating working vs. episodic)."]}]
15:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"get_context"}]
16:["$","p",null,{"children":"Retrieve recent memories for context building, useful for injecting into prompts."}]
17:["$","$L70",null,{"code":"get_context(\n  limit: int = 10,\n) -> list[dict]\n","language":"python"}]
18:["$","p",null,{"children":"Returns the most recent memories across working and episodic tiers, ordered by recency."}]
19:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"get_stats"}]
1a:["$","p",null,{"children":"Return statistics about the memory store."}]
1b:["$","$L70",null,{"code":"get_stats() -> dict\n","language":"python"}]
1c:["$","p",null,{"children":["Returns a dictionary with keys such as ",["$","code",null,{"children":"total_memories"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"total_sessions"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sources"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"last_memory"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"database"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mode"}],", and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"beam"}]," (with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"working_memory"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"episodic_memory"}]," sub-stats)."]}]
1d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"forget"}]
1e:["$","p",null,{"children":"Delete a specific memory by ID."}]
1f:["$","$L70",null,{"code":"forget(memory_id: str) -> bool\n","language":"python"}]
20:["$","p",null,{"children":["Returns ",["$","code",null,{"children":"True"}]," if the memory was found and deleted, ",["$","code",null,{"children":"False"}]," otherwise."]}]
21:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"update"}]
22:["$","p",null,{"children":"Update an existing memory's content or importance."}]
23:["$","$L70",null,{"code":"update(\n  memory_id: str,\n  content: str | None = None,\n  importance: float | None = None,\n) -> bool\n","language":"python"}]
24:["$","p",null,{"children":["Only the fields you provide will be changed. Returns ",["$","code",null,{"children":"True"}]," on success."]}]
25:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"invalidate"}]
26:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mark a memory as superseded by another."}]
27:["$","$L70",null,{"code":"invalidate(\n  memory_id: str,\n  replacement_id: str | None = None,\n) -> bool\n","language":"python"}]
28:["$","p",null,{"children":["Sets the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"superseded_by"}]," field on the target memory, signalling that it is no longer the canonical version. Pass a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"replacement_id"}]," to link to the new memory."]}]
29:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"sleep"}]
2a:["$","p",null,{"children":"Run the sleep/consolidation cycle — groups working memories by source, summarizes them, promotes to episodic memory, and evicts originals."}]
2b:["$","$L70",null,{"code":"sleep(dry_run: bool = False) -> dict\n","language":"python"}]
2c:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Parameter"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"dry_run"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"bool"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"False"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["If ",["$","code",null,{"children":"True"}],", reports what would happen without making changes"]}]]}]}]]}]
2d:["$","p",null,{"children":"Returns a summary dict of consolidation actions performed."}]
2e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"degrade_episodic"}]
2f:["$","p",null,{"children":"Run the tiered degradation cycle that compresses old episodic memories."}]
30:["$","$L70",null,{"code":"degrade_episodic(dry_run: bool = False) -> dict\n","language":"python"}]
31:["$","p",null,{"children":["Returns a dict with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tier1_to_tier2"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tier2_to_tier3"}]," counts. Called automatically during ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}],". Configure via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER2_DAYS"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER3_DAYS"}],", and tier weight env vars. (v2.3)"]}]
32:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"get_contaminated"}]
33:["$","p",null,{"children":"Surface non-stated memories for audit and review."}]
34:["$","$L70",null,{"code":"get_contaminated(limit: int = 50, min_importance: float = 0.0) -> list[dict]\n","language":"python"}]
35:["$","p",null,{"children":["Returns episodic memories where veracity is NOT ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"stated\""}],": everything inferred, tool-generated, imported, or unknown. Sorted by importance descending. Use for periodic cleanup of AI-inferred memories. (v2.3)"]}]
36:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"sleep_all_sessions"}]
37:["$","p",null,{"children":"Run consolidation and degradation across all sessions (not just the current one)."}]
38:["$","$L70",null,{"code":"sleep_all_sessions(dry_run: bool = False) -> dict\n","language":"python"}]
39:["$","p",null,{"children":"Returns a dict with per-session consolidation and degradation summaries. (v2.3)"}]
3a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"V2 Properties"}]
3b:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}]," instance exposes several v2 subsystems as properties:"]}]
3c:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Property"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"stream"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MemoryStream"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Thread-safe event stream with push (callbacks) and pull (iterator) patterns for real-time memory notifications"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"compressor"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MemoryCompressor"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Dictionary-based, RLE, and semantic compression strategies for reducing memory footprint"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"patterns"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"PatternDetector"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Detects temporal (hour/weekday), content (keyword frequency, co-occurrence), and sequence patterns across memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"delta_sync"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"DeltaSync"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Incremental synchronization between Mnemosyne instances with checkpointed resume support"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"plugin_manager"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"PluginManager"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Discovers and manages plugins from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/mnemosyne/plugins/"}],". Built-in: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"LoggingPlugin"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MetricsPlugin"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"FilterPlugin"}]]}]]}]]}]]}]
3d:["$","$L70",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\n\n# Access the stream for real-time notifications\nmem.stream.subscribe(lambda event: print(f\"New memory: {event}\"))\n\n# Detect patterns across stored memories\npatterns = mem.patterns.detect_temporal(session_id=\"agent-42\")\n\n# Incremental sync to another instance\nmem.delta_sync.push(remote_instance)\n","language":"python"}]
3e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Scratchpad"}]
3f:["$","p",null,{"children":"A lightweight temporary scratchpad for transient notes that don't belong in the memory hierarchy."}]
40:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"scratchpad_write"}]

48:["$","p",null,{"children":"Clears all scratchpad entries for the current session."}]
49:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Maintenance & Export"}]

56:["$","p",null,{"children":"Returns a dict with import statistics."}]
57:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"TripleStore Class"}]
58:["$","p",null,{"children":"A separate class for managing structured subject-predicate-object triples (temporal knowledge graph)."}]
59:["$","$L70",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import TripleStore\n\nts = TripleStore()\n","language":"python"}]
5a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"add"}]

5c:["$","p",null,{"children":"Adds a triple and returns its ID. Auto-invalidates previous triples with the same (subject, predicate) pair."}]

5f:["$","p",null,{"children":["Query triples by any combination of subject, predicate, or object. Pass ",["$","code",null,{"children":"as_of"}]," for temporal point-in-time queries."]}]

65:["$","$L70",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import remember, recall, get_context, get_stats\nfrom mnemosyne import forget, update, sleep\nfrom mnemosyne import scratchpad_write, scratchpad_read, scratchpad_clear\n\n# These are equivalent to using Mnemosyne() with session_id=\"default\"\nremember(\"Some important fact\")\nresults = recall(\"important fact\")\n","language":"python"}]
66:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Hermes Plugin Tools"}]
